title: Glow in the Dark Mega Party Pack - Neon Glow Sticks - 196 Pieces
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: Mega Pack Of Glow Novelties, 196 Per Pack
COLORFUL DESIGN: This Mega Pack Of Glow Novelties has a colorful design that shines brightly in the dark, with fun and exciting colors that anyone can enjoy.
USE ANYWHERE: This Mega Pack Of Glow Novelties can be used to light up any space for any occasion.
